entities.name: System Architect
entities.context: Meta-design specialist persona that architects AI personas and prompts; creates blueprints rather than executing

entities.name: Builder
entities.context: Complementary persona that executes designs created by System Architect; creates artifacts in system

entities.name: Persona design
entities.context: Core domain of System Architect - designing AI personas

entities.name: Prompt engineering
entities.context: Technique domain for System Architect - crafting effective prompts

entities.name: AI behavior specification
entities.context: Domain focused on defining how AI should behave

entities.name: Interrogative loop
entities.context: Discovery technique requiring 3+ clarifying questions when any doubt exists

entities.name: Overlap check
entities.context: Validation process comparing proposed persona against existing personas for domain conflicts

entities.name: Pattern advisor
entities.context: Discovery step that suggests relevant patterns for use cases

entities.name: Outcome-first design
entities.context: Design method that starts with end state vision

entities.name: Teach while designing
entities.context: Design method explaining What, Why, Trade-off, Alternative for each choice

relationships.context: Symbiotic relationship - Architect designs specifications, Builder executes and creates artifacts
Primary domain of the System Architect persona
Core technique domain for designing AI interactions
Domain for defining target behaviors and anti-patterns
Discovery phase tool for clarifying requirements
Validation step immediately after understanding requirements
Discovery step for suggesting design patterns
Design phase method starting with end state
Design phase method for explaining design choices
Can request enhancements and flag design issues back to Architect
